API-Key aus der FoxESS Cloud: API key from the FoxESS Cloud portal
Aktualisierungsintervall in Sekunden (Em: Update interval in seconds (Recommended: 60, Minimum: 60, API limit: 1440 calls/day)
Generate daily energy data for the curre: Generate daily energy data for the current week (Monday to Sunday)
Generate monthly energy data for the cur: Generate monthly energy data for the current year (all 12 months)
Generate weekly energy data for the curr: Generate weekly energy data for the current month (all weeks in this month)
Generate JSON tables for daily (current: Generate JSON tables for daily (current week), weekly (current month), and monthly (current year) PV power data for VIS widgets
extended_statistics_info_text: Totals (day/week/month) are saved automatically after each poll and restored when the adapter restarts – there is no need to manually clear or adjust the start values in the config. The start values in the config are only applied on the very first start of this instance. For long-term historical data, please use iobroker.history or iobroker.influxdb.
Optional: Enter price per kWh for cost c: Optional: Enter price per kWh for cost calculations. Leave empty or 0 to disable price display
start_value_daily_help: Optional start value for today – applied only on the very first start of this instance. Afterwards, totals are saved automatically and restored after every restart.
start_value_weekly_help: Optional start value for the current week – applied only on the very first start of this instance. Afterwards, totals are saved automatically and restored after every restart.
start_value_monthly_help: Optional start value for the current month – applied only on the very first start of this instance. Afterwards, totals are saved automatically and restored after every restart.
instance_info_text: For an additional inverter, please create a new instance. Only one serial number can be specified per instance.
